tables.description: The Phase 2 Exam was conducted between 2000 and 2004. This dataset includes history of hypertension, myocardial infarction, coronary revascularization, stroke, diabetes, lung disease, cancer, smoking history, physical activity, alcohol use; and for women: menopause status, pregnancy status and pregnancy history.

variables.name: ALCOHOL
variables.description: Would you describe yourself as a person who never drinks alcoholic beverages or a person who sometimes drinks?

variables.name: ALCOHOLN
variables.description: Comment field

variables.name: ANGIOYR
variables.description: In what year or how old were you when you first had this procedure? - year
